name: Baseline
description: Minimal harness constraints. Good for exposing raw failure modes.

name: Test-first
description: Requires test discovery or test inspection before code edits.
constraints: cannot finalize without target test result

name: Context-first
description: Requires relevant source context before patching.

name: Guarded recovery
description: Adds retry limits, loop breakers, blocked unsafe commands, and failure-output inspection.

name: RL-lite router
description: Selects a harness policy based on task features and reward history.
